title: Coronet City Zoological and Botanical Gardens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''[[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] Zoological and Botanical Gardens''' provided [[Rostek Horn]] with [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] dung to use as fertilizer for his flower gardens.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2014-01-24 -->''[[Suns of Fortune]]''
